title: Close Timeline date selector when I click Enter
excerpt: In the Timeline column, I select the dates and then there is no X so I have to click somewhere on the background screen. Could you make it so that you can click Enter on your keyboard to close it?

posts.author: Kirby (Kirby Birch)
posts.cookedHtml: In the Timeline column, I select the dates and then there is no X so I have to click somewhere on the background screen. Could you make it so that you can click Enter on your keyboard to close it?
